non_functional_requirements.description: The Bun-based API backend must maintain low-latency responses for search and asset queries to ensure the 'AI Agent' discovery experience remains responsive.
non_functional_requirements.threshold: P95 API latency must not exceed 200ms for search queries and asset retrieval endpoints.
non_functional_requirements.measurement_method: APM profiling on API Gateway (Traefik) measuring 95th percentile response time during load tests.

non_functional_requirements.description: Media ingestion endpoints using SeaweedFS must sustain high throughput during concurrent property asset uploads without blocking the AI analysis pipeline.
non_functional_requirements.threshold: System must ingest 5GB of mixed media (images, splats) per minute per instance without queue backlog.
non_functional_requirements.measurement_method: Throughput testing simulating concurrent 500MB file uploads with monitoring of ingestion queue depth.

non_functional_requirements.description: DBOS versioned workflows must ensure state persistence to guarantee no data loss during long-running service matching or compliance check processes.
non_functional_requirements.threshold: Workflow state checkpoints must occur every 1 second to prevent state loss during network interruptions.
non_functional_requirements.measurement_method: Review of DBOS state store metrics and injection of artificial network latency to verify checkpoint frequency.

non_functional_requirements.description: Row-Level Security (RLS) enforced via the database must ensure multi-tenant isolation prevents unauthorized data access between individual homeowners and staff.
non_functional_requirements.threshold: Unauthorized cross-tenant access attempts must be logged and return 403 Forbidden within 10ms.
non_functional_requirements.measurement_method: Penetration testing attempting to access Tenant B data while authenticated as Tenant A user.

non_functional_requirements.description: All data in transit and at rest must be encrypted to protect sensitive property and financial data handled in 'Production Grade' scenarios.
non_functional_requirements.threshold: TLS 1.3 for all external connections; AES-256 for database and media storage encryption at rest.
non_functional_requirements.measurement_method: Review of server configurations and database schema (e.g., PostgreSQL TDE) and network traffic analysis.

non_functional_requirements.description: The system must scale horizontally to support increased volume of property owners and concurrent service provider matching.
non_functional_requirements.threshold: Support 1,000 concurrent users per tenant without degradation of core AI Agent functionality.
non_functional_requirements.measurement_method: Load testing increasing concurrent user count to verify system metrics and response time stability.

non_functional_requirements.description: Offline-mode data synchronization for mobile apps must ensure no data loss when network connectivity is restored.
non_functional_requirements.threshold: Sync queue must process pending data within 30 minutes of reconnection with 100% data integrity.
non_functional_requirements.measurement_method: Simulate network disconnection and restoration, verifying database consistency and user task completion status.

non_functional_requirements.description: The SvelteKit frontend portal must be usable by individuals with disabilities including screen reader support and keyboard navigation.
non_functional_requirements.threshold: Conformity to WCAG 2.1 Level AA standard with no critical accessibility violations.
non_functional_requirements.measurement_method: Automated accessibility scanning (axe-core) and manual audit by assistive technology users.

non_functional_requirements.description: The platform must provide comprehensive observability to track the health of DBOS workflows and media storage.
non_functional_requirements.threshold: 90% of critical system events (errors, timeouts) must be captured and logged with unique correlation IDs.
non_functional_requirements.measurement_method: Review of centralized log aggregation pipelines (e.g., ELK/Loki) and error rate monitoring dashboards.

non_functional_requirements.description: Authentication tokens and API keys must rotate automatically to prevent credential compromise.
non_functional_requirements.threshold: Authentication tokens must expire after 15 minutes; rotation must occur without downtime.
non_functional_requirements.measurement_method: Review of JWT expiration claims in traffic logs and verification of automatic token renewal functionality.

non_functional_requirements.description: Message delivery for statutory notices must complete within a defined SLA even during partial outages.
non_functional_requirements.threshold: 99.5% of mass email/SMS delivery attempts must complete within 5 minutes of message queue acceptance.
non_functional_requirements.measurement_method: Monitoring of message queue depth and delivery confirmation events against the initial queue timestamp.

non_functional_requirements.description: The codebase must be structured to support versioned updates of DBOS workflows without breaking existing tenant data.
non_functional_requirements.threshold: Workflow migrations must be backward compatible to support 2 major version releases without data migration downtime.
non_functional_requirements.measurement_method: Version upgrade tests verifying existing tenant data integrity after deploying workflow version updates.
